title: Armisteel
description: Fabric port of the decoration blocks from Armistice: the Peace Engines
body:
Blocks from the future, bringing peace to today.

Back by popular demand~ While Armistice for Fabric is a ways off, we're bringing back the extremely popular Armisteel family of decorations blocks from ModFest 1.21, with an expanded variety of 4 new palettes: ionized, scorched, rusted and corroded armisteeel variants. Ruin the earth as you wait for the Cruelty Engines to return!

### Usage

This mod includes a variety of dieselpunk/dark industrial themed blocks, expanding on the decoration blocks added in [Armistice: the Peace Engines](https://modrinth.com/mod/armistice) which were presented at ModFest 1.21. In addition to the standard armisteel patterns (mesh, plating, vents), there are four recolored variants for each, as well as a variety of exciting other apocalyptic decorations such as slag and ash.

Lore-wise, armisteel is an indestructible metal from a far future following humanity's exinction. It can be ionized, scorched, rusted or corroded, but never destroyed in a meaningful capacity.
